note: Worker deployed 2026-05-03 (Session 9 Phase B6). To rotate the Worker URL after a redeploy, update workerBaseUrl. To disable the Ask tab without redeploying the Worker, flip aiEnabled to false here. The Worker also has its own env.AI_DISABLED kill switch (in wrangler.toml) — that one disables at the server side, this one disables at the browser side.
